blended.narrative: Afton Alps is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 825 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: flurries, highs of 26°F, winds around 21 mph.
